title: Dispatcher Board — Phase 3: Backend Integration
description: Replace mock data with real API calls. Load jobs and drivers on mount. Persist assignments to backend after drag-and-drop with optimistic updates and rollback on failure.
acceptanceCriteria: Board fetches jobs (status DRAFT and ASSIGNED) from GET /api/jobs on mount
Board fetches drivers from GET /api/users?role=DRIVER on mount
Jobs and drivers replace mock data — mockData.ts is no longer imported
onDragEnd sends PATCH /api/jobs/:id with { assignedDriverId } after state update
On PATCH failure state rolls back to pre-drop snapshot and console.error is called
Loading state shown while initial fetch is in progress
implementationNotes: Use the existing configured axios instance from src/api/axios.ts
Optimistic update: snapshot jobs before setJobs, restore snapshot in catch block
GET /api/users?role=DRIVER — verify this query param is supported in users.ts, add it if missing
PATCH /api/jobs/:id already exists — only assignedDriverId field needs to be sent
Job type should be imported from a shared types file if one exists, not redefined
Do not change drag-and-drop logic from phase 2 — only replace data source
